visa_types.name: Airport Transit
visa_types.documents_required:
Kindly refer to the list of requisite
                                      documents below before submitting your
                                      application; this will minimize chances of
                                      rejection of your Visa Application due to
                                      incorrect or inadequate documents.

                                    
Checklist for Airport Transit
Travel Plan
Sponsorship letter
 Instructions for applicants below 18 years
                                    

- For all children below 18 years, parents/legal guardian need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the application form.
- All children need to be present.
- Physical Photographs: Applicants are no longer required to submit a physical passport photograph if their biometrics (including digital photo enrolment) are captured at the Visa Application Centre (VAC).
- Applicants are no longer required to provide a copy of their current passport. Copies are only applicable for previous/old passports, where relevant
visa_types.processing_time:
Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy)
                                      – normally 15 calendar days, See the
                                      processing time in
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa)
                                      for a fully completed application with
                                      proper documentation which is handed in at
                                      the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please
                                      hand in your application well in advance
                                      during peak season.
                                    

                                      The processing period may be extended up
                                      to a maximum of 30 calendar days in
                                      individual cases, notably if further
                                      scrutiny of the application is needed or
                                      in cases of representation where the
                                      authorities of the represented Schengen
                                      State are consulted.
                                    

                                      Exceptionally, when additional
                                      documentation is needed in specific cases,
                                      the period may be extended up to a maximum
                                      of 60 calendar days.
                                    

                                      Citizens of certain countries or
                                      categories of certain citizens are subject
                                      to prior consultation in one or more
                                      Schengen countries before a visa may be
                                      issued. The processing time in these cases
                                      will usually be 10-12 days as a minimum.
                                      See list of these nationalities and
                                        categories of persons (annex 16 to the
                                        Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
                                    

                                      Kindly note that if you are applying from
                                      VFS in Bahrain, it will take additional
                                      3-4 days due to logistics
                                    

                                      Kindly note that the 15-day processing
                                      time for Schengen visa applications to
                                      Denmark submitted at VFS before Eid Fitr
                                      period will start from the date the
                                      applications are received at the Danish
                                      Embassy in Riyadh from VFS when the
                                      Embassy resumes working after the Eid Fitr
                                      holiday.
visa_types.overview:
Overview

                                      Visa is valid to visit all the Schengen
                                      States.
                                    

                                      Only Bahrain nationals and nationals of
                                      third countries that are legal residents
                                      in Bahrain can apply for a visa at the
                                      Embassy of Denmark in Riyadh.
                                    

                                      Applicant will have to provide evidence
                                      that he/she falls under this category,
                                      kindly refer to the information sheet of
                                      documents required.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

                                      Visa is valid to visit all the Schengen
                                      States.
                                    

                                      Only Bahrain nationals and nationals of
                                      third countries that are legal residents
                                      in Bahrain can apply for a visa at the
                                      Embassy of Denmark in Riyadh.
                                    

                                      Applicant will have to provide evidence
                                      that he/she falls under this category,
                                      kindly refer to the information sheet of
                                      documents required.
                                    

## Visa Fees

[Table:
                                      Airport Transit
                                    ]

## Documents Required

                                      Kindly refer to the list of requisite
                                      documents below before submitting your
                                      application; this will minimize chances of
                                      rejection of your Visa Application due to
                                      incorrect or inadequate documents.

                                    
Checklist for Airport Transit
Travel Plan
Sponsorship letter
 Instructions for applicants below 18 years
                                    

- For all children below 18 years, parents/legal guardian need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the application form.
- All children need to be present.
- Physical Photographs: Applicants are no longer required to submit a physical passport photograph if their biometrics (including digital photo enrolment) are captured at the Visa Application Centre (VAC).
- Applicants are no longer required to provide a copy of their current passport. Copies are only applicable for previous/old passports, where relevant

## Photo Specifications

                                      Applicants are required to submit their
                                      Application form along a photo in the
                                      format, as explained in the pdf below:
                                      Two recent biometric passport sized
                                      photographs (3.5x4,5 cm) as per
                                      specifications.
                                    
Click here
                                      to view sample photos
                                    
Requirements:
- NEW! Should NOT be older than 6 months
- A frontal view of the face covering
                                        70-80% (32-24.5.5mm) of the photo
- A uniform and white-colored background
- Clear facial features and eyes – not
                                        covered by hair or glasses frame
- Head coverings are only accepted for
                                        religious reasons
- Do not glue or staple the pictures to
                                        the application form

## Processing Time

                                      Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy)
                                      – normally 15 calendar days, See the
                                      processing time in
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa)
                                      for a fully completed application with
                                      proper documentation which is handed in at
                                      the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please
                                      hand in your application well in advance
                                      during peak season.
                                    

                                      The processing period may be extended up
                                      to a maximum of 30 calendar days in
                                      individual cases, notably if further
                                      scrutiny of the application is needed or
                                      in cases of representation where the
                                      authorities of the represented Schengen
                                      State are consulted.
                                    

                                      Exceptionally, when additional
                                      documentation is needed in specific cases,
                                      the period may be extended up to a maximum
                                      of 60 calendar days.
                                    

                                      Citizens of certain countries or
                                      categories of certain citizens are subject
                                      to prior consultation in one or more
                                      Schengen countries before a visa may be
                                      issued. The processing time in these cases
                                      will usually be 10-12 days as a minimum.
                                      See list of these nationalities and
                                        categories of persons (annex 16 to the
                                        Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
                                    

                                      Kindly note that if you are applying from
                                      VFS in Bahrain, it will take additional
                                      3-4 days due to logistics
                                    

                                      Kindly note that the 15-day processing
                                      time for Schengen visa applications to
                                      Denmark submitted at VFS before Eid Fitr
                                      period will start from the date the
                                      applications are received at the Danish
                                      Embassy in Riyadh from VFS when the
                                      Embassy resumes working after the Eid Fitr
                                      holiday.
                                    

## Download Form

                                      Please visit
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/ (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/)
                                      to fill in the online visa application
                                      Form

visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
Kindly refer to the list of requisite
                                      documents below before submitting your
                                      application; this will minimize chances of
                                      rejection of your Visa Application due to
                                      incorrect or inadequate documents.
                                    
Checklist for Tourist
Travel Plan
Sponsorship letter
Instructions for applicants below 18 years
                                    

- For all children below 18 years, parents/legal guardian need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the application form.
- All children need to be present.
- Physical Photographs: Applicants are no longer required to submit a physical passport photograph if their biometrics (including digital photo enrolment) are captured at the Visa Application Centre (VAC).
- Applicants are no longer required to provide a copy of their current passport. Copies are only applicable for previous/old passports, where relevant
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Tourist]

Please note:

- The applicable visa fee in EURO/BHD is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of BHD 8.2 per application over and above visa fees. (inclusive of 10% VAT)
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Service fee are payable only in Cash.
- Please note Applicants applying in Manama need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 7 (BHD 3.050) it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Center in Manama, Bahrain

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

                                      Visa is valid to visit all the Schengen
                                      States.
                                    

                                      Only Bahrain nationals and nationals of
                                      third countries that are legal residents
                                      in Bahrain can apply for a visa at the
                                      Embassy of Denmark in Riyadh.
                                    

                                      Applicant will have to provide evidence
                                      that he/she falls under this category,
                                      kindly refer to the information sheet of
                                      documents required.
                                    

## Visa Fees

[Table:Tourist]

Please note:

- The applicable visa fee in EURO/BHD is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of BHD 8.2 per application over and above visa fees. (inclusive of 10% VAT)
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Service fee are payable only in Cash.
- Please note Applicants applying in Manama need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 7 (BHD 3.050) it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Center in Manama, Bahrain

## Documents Required

                                      Kindly refer to the list of requisite
                                      documents below before submitting your
                                      application; this will minimize chances of
                                      rejection of your Visa Application due to
                                      incorrect or inadequate documents.
                                    
Checklist for Tourist
Travel Plan
Sponsorship letter
Instructions for applicants below 18 years
                                    

- For all children below 18 years, parents/legal guardian need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the application form.
- All children need to be present.
- Physical Photographs: Applicants are no longer required to submit a physical passport photograph if their biometrics (including digital photo enrolment) are captured at the Visa Application Centre (VAC).
- Applicants are no longer required to provide a copy of their current passport. Copies are only applicable for previous/old passports, where relevant

## Photo Specifications

                                      Applicants are required to submit their
                                      Application form along a photo in the
                                      format, as explained in the pdf below:
                                      Two recent biometric passport sized
                                      photographs (3.5x4,5 cm) as per
                                      specifications.
                                    
Click here
                                      to view sample photos
                                    
Requirements:
- NEW! Should NOT be older than 6 months
- A frontal view of the face covering
                                        70-80% (32-24.5.5mm) of the photo
- A uniform and white-colored background
- Clear facial features and eyes – not
                                        covered by hair or glasses frame
- Head coverings are only accepted for
                                        religious reasons
- Do not glue or staple the pictures to
                                        the application form

## Processing Time

                                      Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy)
                                      – normally 15 calendar days, See the
                                      processing time in
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa)
                                      for a fully completed application with
                                      proper documentation which is handed in at
                                      the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please
                                      hand in your application well in advance
                                      during peak season.
                                    

                                      The processing period may be extended up
                                      to a maximum of 30 calendar days in
                                      individual cases, notably if further
                                      scrutiny of the application is needed or
                                      in cases of representation where the
                                      authorities of the represented Schengen
                                      State are consulted.
                                    

                                      Exceptionally, when additional
                                      documentation is needed in specific cases,
                                      the period may be extended up to a maximum
                                      of 60 calendar days.
                                    

                                      Citizens of certain countries or
                                      categories of certain citizens are subject
                                      to prior consultation in one or more
                                      Schengen countries before a visa may be
                                      issued. The processing time in these cases
                                      will usually be 10-12 days as a minimum.
                                      See list of these nationalities and
                                        categories of persons (annex 16 to the
                                        Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
                                    

                                      Kindly note that if you are applying from
                                      VFS in Bahrain, it will take additional
                                      3-4 days due to logistics
                                    

                                      Kindly note that the 15-day processing
                                      time for Schengen visa applications to
                                      Denmark submitted at VFS before Eid Fitr
                                      period will start from the date the
                                      applications are received at the Danish
                                      Embassy in Riyadh from VFS when the
                                      Embassy resumes working after the Eid Fitr
                                      holiday.
                                    

## Download Form

                                      Please visit
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/ (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/)
                                      to fill in the online visa application
                                      Form

visa_types.name: Short Term Stay
visa_types.overview:
(For a maximum stay of 90 days per 6 months)
                              

                                If you wish to visit Denmark for a short period
                                of time, you must obtain a Schengen visa prior
                                to your arrival.
                              

                                Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit
                                through or remain in Schengen States for a
                                maximum period of three months (90 days) within
                                a period of six months (180 days) from the entry
                                date into the Schengen Area.
visa_types.full_text:
(For a maximum stay of 90 days per 6 months)
                              

                                If you wish to visit Denmark for a short period
                                of time, you must obtain a Schengen visa prior
                                to your arrival.
                              

                                Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit
                                through or remain in Schengen States for a
                                maximum period of three months (90 days) within
                                a period of six months (180 days) from the entry
                                date into the Schengen Area.

                                      of 60 calendar days.
                                    

                                      Citizens of certain countries or
                                      categories of certain citizens are subject
                                      to prior consultation in one or more
                                      Schengen countries before a visa may be
                                      issued. The processing time in these cases
                                      will usually be 10-12 days as a minimum.
                                      See list of these nationalities and
                                        categories of persons (annex 16 to the
                                        Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
                                    

                                      Kindly note that if you are applying from
                                      VFS in Bahrain, it will take additional
                                      3-4 days due to logistics
                                    

                                      Kindly note that the 15-day processing
                                      time for Schengen visa applications to
                                      Denmark submitted at VFS before Eid Fitr
                                      period will start from the date the
                                      applications are received at the Danish
                                      Embassy in Riyadh from VFS when the
                                      Embassy resumes working after the Eid Fitr
                                      holiday.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview

                                      Visa is valid to visit all the Schengen
                                      States.
                                    

                                      Only Bahrain nationals and nationals of
                                      third countries that are legal residents
                                      in Bahrain can apply for a visa at the
                                      Embassy of Denmark in Riyadh.
                                    

                                      Applicant will have to provide evidence
                                      that he/she falls under this category,
                                      kindly refer to the information sheet of
                                      documents required.
                                    

## Visa Fees

[Table:Business]

Please note:

- The applicable visa fee in EURO/BHD is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of BHD 8.2 per application over and above visa fees. (inclusive of 10% VAT)
- All fees are non-refundable.
- Service fee are payable only in Cash.
- Please note Applicants applying in Manama need to pay mandatory courier charges which is Euro 7 (BHD 3.050) it includes one-way courier charges pertaining to the transfer of visa applications from Riyadh back to regional VFS Visa Application Center in Manama, Bahrain

## Documents Required

Kindly refer to the list of requisite documents below before submitting your application; this will minimize chances of rejection of your Visa Application due to incorrect or inadequate documents.
                                    
Checklist for Business
Travel Plan
Sponsorship letter

Instructions for applicants below 18 years
- For all children below 18 years, parents/legal guardian need to be present at the Visa Application Centre to sign the application form.
- All children need to be present.
- Physical Photographs: Applicants are no longer required to submit a physical passport photograph if their biometrics (including digital photo enrolment) are captured at the Visa Application Centre (VAC).
- Applicants are no longer required to provide a copy of their current passport. Copies are only applicable for previous/old passports, where relevant

## Photo Specifications

                                      Applicants are required to submit their
                                      Application form along a photo in the
                                      format, as explained in the pdf below:
                                      Two recent biometric passport sized
                                      photographs (3.5x4,5 cm) as per
                                      specifications.
                                    
Click here
                                      to view sample photos
                                    
Requirements:
- NEW! Should NOT be older than 6 months
- A frontal view of the face covering
                                        70-80% (32-24.5.5mm) of the photo
- A uniform and white-colored background
- Clear facial features and eyes – not
                                        covered by hair or glasses frame
- Head coverings are only accepted for
                                        religious reasons
- Do not glue or staple the pictures to
                                        the application form

## Processing Time

                                      Bona fide cases (Approved by the Embassy)
                                      – normally 15 calendar days, See the
                                      processing time in
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-are-waiting-for-an-answer/Short-stay-visa)
                                      for a fully completed application with
                                      proper documentation which is handed in at
                                      the VFS Visa Application Centre. Please
                                      hand in your application well in advance
                                      during peak season.
                                    

                                      The processing period may be extended up
                                      to a maximum of 30 calendar days in
                                      individual cases, notably if further
                                      scrutiny of the application is needed or
                                      in cases of representation where the
                                      authorities of the represented Schengen
                                      State are consulted.
                                    

                                      Exceptionally, when additional
                                      documentation is needed in specific cases,
                                      the period may be extended up to a maximum
                                      of 60 calendar days.
                                    

                                      Citizens of certain countries or
                                      categories of certain citizens are subject
                                      to prior consultation in one or more
                                      Schengen countries before a visa may be
                                      issued. The processing time in these cases
                                      will usually be 10-12 days as a minimum.
                                      See list of these nationalities and
                                        categories of persons (annex 16 to the
                                        Visa code Handbook) (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/da/Lovstof/Visumkodeks-mm_/Visumh%C3%A5ndbogen).
                                    

                                      Kindly note that if you are applying from
                                      VFS in Bahrain, it will take additional
                                      3-4 days due to logistics
                                    

                                      Kindly note that the 15-day processing
                                      time for Schengen visa applications to
                                      Denmark submitted at VFS before Eid Fitr
                                      period will start from the date the
                                      applications are received at the Danish
                                      Embassy in Riyadh from VFS when the
                                      Embassy resumes working after the Eid Fitr
                                      holiday.
                                    

## Download Form

                                      Please visit
                                      https://www.nyidanmark.dk/ (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/)
                                      to fill in the online visa application
                                      Form
